description.zh: 把 23×14 的大厦拆成四块彩色施工区，算对一块就看它满墙窗户逐格亮起；通关还有竖式 X 光揭秘每一行来自哪块楼。最后化身拆迁队，一层层炸掉 312 间房，亲手拆出除法。
description.en: Split a 23×14 tower into four colour-coded build zones and watch every window light up as you solve each block, then see a long-multiplication X-ray map each line to a zone. Finally join the demolition crew and blast 312 rooms floor by floor to uncover division.
